hero.name: Your Name
hero.tagline: Aspiring Master of Computer Applications student with a strong portfolio in Generative AI.
hero.description: Experienced in developing full-stack applications using Python, FastAPI, Flask, Flutter and various AI models like GPT-2 and Stable Diffusion. Proven ability to build, fine-tune, and deploy machine learning solutions, from personalized learning assistants to image generation tools.

bio: Seeking to apply advanced AI/ML skills to solve complex problems. My journey into AI/ML is driven by a passion for creating intelligent solutions that impact real-world challenges. From fine-tuning cutting-edge models to deploying scalable full-stack applications, I thrive on bringing innovative ideas to life.
I am eager to contribute my skills and knowledge to groundbreaking projects and continue learning in the dynamic field of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.

services.title: Generative AI Solutions
services.description: Developing innovative applications using models like GPT-2 and Stable Diffusion.

services.title: Full-stack Application Development
services.description: Building robust web applications with Python (FastAPI, Flask), Flutter and modern frontends.

services.title: Machine Learning Deployment
services.description: Deploying AI/ML models into production environments efficiently.

services.title: Computer Vision Projects
services.description: Implementing solutions for image analysis, translation, and style transfer.

services.title: NLP Solutions
services.description: Creating natural language processing tools, from assistants to text generators.

services.title: Custom AI Model Development
services.description: Building and fine-tuning bespoke AI models for specific problem sets.

projects.title: AI-Powered Speech Recognition System
projects.description: Engineered a robust, full-stack web application for real-time and batch speech-to-text transcription. Integrates faster-whisper (Whisper ASR model) for accurate, multilingual transcription from live microphone streams and uploaded audio files (with intelligent chunking), all presented within a sleek black & gold user interface.

projects.title: AI-Powered Text Summarizer & Sentiment Analyzer
projects.description: Developed a full-stack web application for intelligent text processing, combining abstractive summarization with sentiment analysis. Features include robust long text handling via chunking, an NLTK-based extractive fallback, and a responsive glassmorphism UI. Optimized for performance with model caching and asynchronous processing.

projects.title: Mentra AI – Personalized Learning Assistant
projects.description: Built a lightweight AI assistant using a fine-tuned GPT-2 model with a FastAPI backend and a futuristic HTML/CSS UI. Enabled secure, real-time prompt generation with local .safetensors model loading for offline, private inference.

projects.title: Image Generation with Pre-trained Models
projects.description: Built a Flask web app for real-time image generation using Stable Diffusion models (Realisian, Waifu, OrangeMix). Integrated prompt-based inference with history tracking, async generation, and live usage statistics.

projects.title: AI-Powered Hybrid Text Generator
projects.description: Developed a Flask web app combining Markov Chains and GPT-2 for hybrid multi-genre text generation. Enabled real-time generation with output customization, interactive n-gram analysis, and a responsive Tailwind CSS UI.

projects.title: Pix2Pix Image-to-Image Translation
projects.description: Implemented a Conditional GAN using U-Net and PatchGAN to translate architectural maps into realistic building facades. Trained on the CMP Facades dataset using combined adversarial (GAN) and L1 loss to enhance image sharpness.

projects.title: Neural Style Transfer Web App
projects.description: Built a Streamlit web app for real-time style transfer using TensorFlow Hub's pre-trained stylization model. Enabled user uploads for content and style images, with downloadable stylized outputs and a modular API design.

certificates.title: AI Engineering Essentials: Navigating the Tech Revolution

education.description: Specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning with focus on Generative AI.
Graduated with distinction. Core focus on programming, data structures, and software engineering.
